summary: Iteration 16 testing complete - All title size and auth implementation features verified working correctly
passed_tests: Mobile title (390px viewport) is 2.25rem (36px) - within 2.25-2.75rem range
Extra small mobile title (375px viewport) is 2.25rem (36px) - meets minimum requirement
Sign In button visible in top right corner on both desktop and mobile
Auth modal opens when clicking Sign In button
Auth modal shows 'Continue with Google' button with data-testid='google-login-btn'
Auth modal shows email magic link form with data-testid='magic-link-email'
Auth modal shows Send button with data-testid='send-magic-link-btn'
Auth modal has close button with data-testid='auth-modal-close'
/api/auth/me returns {user: null, is_authenticated: false} when not logged in
Google login button redirects to https://auth.emergentagent.com with correct redirect URL
Magic link send validates email format (returns 422 for invalid)
Magic link verify returns 400 for invalid token
context_for_next_testing_agent: All title size and auth features verified: 1) Desktop title is 14rem (xl:text-[14rem]), 2) Mobile title is 2.25rem (CSS override in App.css lines 542-545 and 630-633), 3) Auth modal uses Emergent Auth at https://auth.emergentagent.com for Google OAuth, 4) Magic link email form present but requires RESEND_API_KEY for actual email sending, 5) All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing

auth_endpoints./api/auth/me: Returns {user: null, is_authenticated: false} when not logged in
auth_endpoints./api/auth/session: Exchanges Emergent Auth session_id for user session
